Description: The TPS54202 is a monolithic synchronous buck converter with a wide 4.5 V to 28 V input range, capable of delivering up to 2 A of continuous output current. It integrates both high-side and low-side MOSFETs, employs peak current-mode control with internal loop compensation, and operates at a fixed 500 kHz switching frequency. Key features include a 5 ms internal soft-start, frequency spread spectrum for reduced EMI, Advanced Eco‑mode for high light‑load efficiency, and comprehensive protection (cycle‑by‑cycle current limit, hiccup overcurrent, overvoltage, and thermal shutdown), all housed in a compact 6‑pin SOT‑23 package.

Functions.FunctionDescription: Source terminal of low‑side power NFET and ground for controller circuit. Connect sensitive feedback ground to this pin at a single point.
Connection between the high‑side and low‑side NFETs.
Input voltage supply pin; drain terminal of the high‑side power NFET.
Converter feedback input. Connect to output voltage via an external resistor divider.
Enable pin. Floating the pin enables the device.
Supply input for the high‑side NFET gate drive. Connect a 0.1 μF capacitor between BOOT and SW pins.
